response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, which is a mandatory requirement, and shows no evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise; his career is dominated by web, mobile, and open-source projects using JavaScript, TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js, with no mention of SQL Server, Oracle, or financial systems.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated expertise in CI/CD, testing, and developer tooling
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education
concerns: No visible C++ or Windows platform experience in 15+ years of work history
Absence of any capital markets, fixed income, or banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed generically without context of enterprise financial systems
